title: festuca rupicola f. longifolia
intro: Festuca rupicola f. longifolia, also known as alpine fescue, is a subspecies of grass native to the alpine regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. Festuca rupicola f. longifolia has been reported to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, potentially providing health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as protecting against cell damage. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
